title: Registry activity log and publish observability

source.subject: feat(admin): registry activity log, publish observability

body:
## Outcome

Registry activity log, publish observability.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **Registry dashboard and package docs foundation** (`v02-pckg-registry-foundation`).

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
